message:
feat(fcp-kernel): extend execution kernel with lease, checkpoint, migration, budget, and quorum re-exports

Expand fcp-kernel's ownership scope to cover all execution-related
semantic domains from fcp-core:

- Lease & execution authority: Lease, LeaseHandoff, LeasePurpose, LeaseParams
- Checkpoint & recovery: ComputationCheckpoint, CheckpointTrigger, MigrationCapabilityContext
- Computation migration: MigratableComputation, MigratableComputationState, ConnectorState*
- Budget & resource accounting: UsageBudgetPolicy, BudgetEnforcement, BudgetStatus
- Rate limiting (execution-level): LimitType, BackpressureLevel, RateLimitConfig
- Quorum & consensus: RiskTier, QuorumPolicy, NodeSignature, SignatureSet
- Shutdown & drain: ShutdownRequest, ShutdownAck

Adds 8 new tests verifying all domain re-exports compile and have
correct variant names. Total: 13 tests.

Part of [FCP3/P2.1] fcp-kernel extraction (bead whkbp).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
